what_it_does: Records a channel attachment metadata entry that links the dragnet-development channel to a board item via a board:// URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
Markdown file used as a ledger attachment record
References an external board item with a board:// URI scheme
concerns: No body or explanatory content beyond the metadata link
Purpose and meaning of the attachment are not described in the file
Target board item cannot be understood from this file alone
notes: A bare attachment stub that points the dragnet-development channel at board item item-e961ec0c.
questions: What content or discussion does this attachment capture?
What does board item item-e961ec0c represent?
Why does the attachment have no body or description?
intention_signals: Establish a persistent, timestamped association between a channel memory artifact and a specific board item for later retrieval or context.
contribution: Provides a durable channel-to-board-item association record with a timestamp, which a fused system could keep as a cross-reference edge.
summary_for_embedding: Channel attachment metadata record mapping the dragnet-development channel to board item item-e961ec0c.
intention_for_embedding: Capture a link between a channel memory entry and a specific board item.
